name: Polished Plaster
description: Polished Plaster is a timeless decorative finish that creates a smooth, luminous surface with depth and texture. Applied by hand in multiple layers and burnished to a high sheen, each surface is entirely unique.

name: Textured
description: Our textured finishes bring movement, dimension and character to any wall. From fine aggregates to bold raised patterns, each application is bespoke to your design brief.

name: Concrete
description: Concrete finishes deliver the raw, industrial aesthetics of poured concrete — without the weight. Available in a wide range of tones from cool grey to warm taupe, these surfaces suit both residential and commercial spaces.

name: Oxidation
description: Oxidation finishes celebrate the beauty of natural chemical reactions — bringing the living, evolving quality of aged metal to interior surfaces. Each piece is entirely one-of-a-kind.

name: Metal Coatings
description: Metal coatings apply real metallic compounds — copper, bronze, iron, brass — directly to walls. Once applied, sculptural patination techniques produce extraordinary visual depth.

name: Tadelakt
description: Tadelakt is an ancient Moroccan lime plaster, polished and sealed with black soap to create a waterproof, highly durable surface. It is stunning in bathrooms, showers and wet areas.

name: Clay Plaster
description: Clay Plaster is a breathable, natural interior coating that regulates humidity and creates a warm, organic surface quality. Available in every colour imaginable.

name: Flooring
description: Our specialist flooring finishes include polished concrete, microcement floors, and tadelakt, delivering seamless, durable and visually compelling surfaces underfoot.

name: Microcement
description: Microcement is an ultra-thin cementitious coating applied over existing substrates. It creates seamless, joint-free surfaces on walls, floors and wet areas — with the flexibility for custom colour and texture.
